# link11waap_global_filters (Data Source)

Lists all global filters in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Global Filters Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_global_filters" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "global_filters" {
  value = data.link11waap_global_filters.all.global_filters
}

output "global_filter_names" {
  value = [for gf in data.link11waap_global_filters.all.global_filters : gf.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `global_filters` (Attributes List) List of global filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--global_filters))

<a id="nestedatt--global_filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `global_filters`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `active` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `mdate` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `rule` (String)
- `source` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
